word: G2079 - ἐσχάτως - eschátōs - es-khat'-oce - Point of death

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Point of death
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
to be in the last gasp, at the point of death
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from G2078; finally, that is, (with G2192) at the extremity of life: - point of death.
